essays:
$$\text{MATRIX MULTIPLICATION:}$$
$$\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ 3 & 4 \end{bmatrix} \times \begin{bmatrix} 5 & 6 \\ 7 & 8 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 19 & 22 \\ 43 & 50 \end{bmatrix}$$
$$\text{EACH ENTRY IS COMPUTED AS A DOT PRODUCT OF A ROW FROM THE LEFT}$$
$$\text{MATRIX AND A COLUMN FROM THE RIGHT MATRIX, E.G. } 19 = 1 \times 5 + 2 \times 7 \text{ AND } 22$$
$$= 1 \times 6 + 2 \times 8.$$

$$\text{CONVOLUTION (FILTER APPLIED TO IMAGE PATCH):}$$
$$[1 \quad 0] \quad [4 \quad 5]$$
$$[0 \quad -1] * [6 \quad 7] = -3$$
$$\text{OVERLAY THE FILTER ON THE PATCH, MULTIPLY CORRESPONDING ENTRIES, AND}$$
$$\text{SUM: } 1 * 4 + 0 * 5 + 0 * 6 + (-1) * 7 = -3.$$

$$\text{DEF MULTIPLICATION\_TABLE(N):}$$
$$\text{RETURN [[I * J FOR J IN RANGE(1, N + 1)] FOR I IN RANGE(1, N + 1)]}$$
$$\text{THIS IS THE SAME NESTED-LOOP IDEA EXPRESSED AS A NESTED LIST}$$
$$\text{COMPREHENSION: FOR EACH I, BUILD A ROW OF I*J VALUES FOR EVERY J FROM 1}$$
$$\text{TO N.}$$
